eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to apply for a first GB provisional driving licence: at least 15 years and 9 months old, permitted to live in Great Britain for at least 185 days, and meets the self-declared eyesight standard.

reasons.requirement: Must be at least 15 years and 9 months old
reasons.sourceRef: Apply for your first provisional driving licence — eligibility

reasons.requirement: Must have permission to live in Great Britain for at least 185 days
reasons.sourceRef: Apply for your first provisional driving licence — eligibility

reasons.requirement: Must be able to read a vehicle number plate from 20 metres away
reasons.sourceRef: Apply for your first provisional driving licence — eligibility

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (gb/dvla/driving-licence-first-provisional). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to DVLA or any government system. A human (the applicant, or their parent/guardian) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through DVLA's own channel (the online service at apply-for-driving-licence.service.gov.uk, or form D1 by post) before this application is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
